question: Which papers report both a dataset URL and an implementation release URL?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?datasetLocation .
  ?datasetLocation orkgp:P1003 ?datasetUrl .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach .
  ?approach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?releaseUrl .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: What natural languages are reported for datasets in papers that also provide an implementation release URL?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?naturalLanguageValue WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?datatype .
  ?datatype orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage .
  OPTIONAL { ?naturalLanguage rdfs:label ?naturalLanguageLabel . }
  BIND(COALESCE(?naturalLanguageLabel, STR(?naturalLanguage)) AS ?naturalLanguageValue)
  ?contribution orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?releaseUrl .
}

question: How many papers report more than one evaluation metric?
Which papers report both an annotation agreement metric and a conflict resolution step?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181041 ?agreement .
  ?agreement orkgp:P181042 ?metric .
  ?agreement orkgp:P181044 ?conflictResolution .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers report a dataset location but no dataset URL?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?datasetLocation .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?datasetLocation orkgp:P1003 ?datasetUrl . }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers report datasets from more than one source and list at least one data source domain?
Which papers published in 2023 report an implementation release URL?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  FILTER(STR(?year) = "2023")
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach .
  ?approach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?releaseUrl .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: Which papers report both an NLP task output type and a translation mapping cardinality?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask .
  ?nlpTask orkgp:P181006 ?output .
  ?output orkgp:P181007 ?outputType .
  ?output orkgp:P181010 ?mappingCardinality .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}

question: What license types are reported for datasets that also provide a dataset URL?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?licenseTypeValue WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:license ?license .
  ?license orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType .
  OPTIONAL { ?licenseType rdfs:label ?licenseTypeLabel . }
  BIND(COALESCE(?licenseTypeLabel, STR(?licenseType)) AS ?licenseTypeValue)
  ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location .
  ?location orkgp:P1003 ?datasetUrl .
}

question: Which papers report an evaluation metric but do not specify any baseline comparison detail?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?evaluation orkgp:P181051 ?baseline .
    ?baseline orkgp:P181053 ?detail .
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel }
}
